reviews.comment:
Muy bueno el trato la predisposición para atender a todos los clientes...pero falla la organización en la fila de entrada a la playa

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, and they were very willing to help all customers...but the organization of the queue to enter the beach was lacking.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1bm91UmZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Te atienden con buena onda, se llevan bien con todos los clientes, que parecen ser habitué.

(Translated by Google)
They serve you with good vibes, they get along well with all the customers, who seem to be regulars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1aW9QQ3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre tiene fila para poder cargar, pero los playeros son de 10, muy atentos. Además del combustible controlaron los neumáticos, aceite y agua del radiador.

(Translated by Google)
There's always a line to fill up, but the attendants are fantastic, very attentive. Besides the fuel, they checked the tires, oil, and radiator water.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1Z1BQM0x3EAE
